title: Binary Search
code:
import Data.Vector (Vector, (!))
import qualified Data.Vector as V

binarySearch :: Ord a => Vector a -> a -> Maybe Int
binarySearch vec target = go 0 (V.length vec - 1)
  where
    go lo hi
      | lo > hi        = Nothing
      | vec ! mid == target = Just mid
      | vec ! mid < target  = go (mid + 1) hi
      | otherwise            = go lo (mid - 1)
      where mid = (lo + hi) `div` 2
description: Binary search over an immutable `Vector` using a recursive helper with guards. Returns `Maybe Int` — `Just` the index on hit, `Nothing` on miss. Uses `Data.Vector` for O(1) indexing.
